notes: fundingTime is documented as settlement time in ms (e.g. 1784649600000). However the 2022 archive object has Last-Modified 2026-02-02, meaning the object was replaced after 2022. No proof the 2022 archive was available in 2022. Settlement semantics documented but historical availability unproven.

Documented: fundingRate=predicted rate for upcoming settlement; realizedRate=actual settled rate. Sign: positive=long pays short at next fundingTime; negative=short pays long. Both are dimensionless decimal rates.

Documented: noRate=old formula; withRate=new formula. REST response for BTC-USDT-SWAP (2026-07-19) shows formulaType=withRate. Historical transition boundary (April 2025) not directly observed but formulaType field present in API.

Documented: default 8h interval; variable 6h/4h/2h/1h for volatile altcoins. 2026 archive shows 4h intervals for 196 instruments (e.g. 0G-USDT-SWAP). Use fundingTime/nextFundingTime difference to determine interval. Variable intervals confirmed in data.

ETag/Content-MD5 present on all archive objects (e.g. 9B200F54D2AF3E2045BF1D26A5D48618 for 2022 archive). However provider replacement policy not established. 2022 object Last-Modified=2026-02-02 proves replacement occurred; no changelog or version history available.

Historical endpoint introduced September 2025 per documentation. 2022 archive object has Last-Modified 2026-02-02 (replacement, not original publication). No conservative historical availability bound separate from local retrieval time. exportTime in API responses equals retrieval time, not publication time.

OKX API terms restrict Market Data to personal, non-commercial use and prohibit redistribution. No commercial license established. Internal acquisition metadata retention may be permitted under fair use but redistribution is explicitly prohibited.

All raw payloads preserved outside Git at /tmp/opencode/source_recheck_20260721/. SHA-256 hashes committed in EVIDENCE_REGISTER.csv. External paths recorded. Provider ETag/Content-MD5 verified against captured objects.

Fail-closed: G01 (historical availability unproven), G05 (replacement policy unestablished), G06 (no publication bound), G07 (redistribution prohibited). Settlement semantics, sign convention, formula type, interval derivation, and raw lineage are documented.
